item.title: Forging a Mexican-Inspired Candle Sconce
item.description: Watch a blacksmith craft a Mexican-inspired candle sconce from raw metal. Step-by-step forging, shaping, and finishing for a functional and decorative piece.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Mexican-Inspired Candle Sconce
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith craft a Mexican-inspired candle sconce from raw metal. Step-by-step forging, shaping, and finishing for a functional and decorative piece.

item.title: Crafting a Functional Rustic Screwdriver
item.description: Watch a blacksmith turn raw metal into a durable, rustic screwdriver. Step-by-step forging and finishing to create a practical, handcrafted tool.

media:content.media:title: Crafting a Functional Rustic Screwdriver
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith turn raw metal into a durable, rustic screwdriver. Step-by-step forging and finishing to create a practical, handcrafted tool.

item.title: Why Investing in Quality Tools Matters
item.description: See how cheap tools fail under real use and why high-quality tools save time, effort, and frustration. A practical lesson in craftsmanship and durability.

media:content.media:title: Why Investing in Quality Tools Matters
media:content.media:description: See how cheap tools fail under real use and why high-quality tools save time, effort, and frustration. A practical lesson in craftsmanship and durability.

item.title: Do NOT Do This When Blacksmithing
item.description: A critical blacksmithing mistake you should avoid. Learn what went wrong, why it matters, and how to stay safe and protect your work in the forge.

media:content.media:title: Do NOT Do This When Blacksmithing
media:content.media:description: A critical blacksmithing mistake you should avoid. Learn what went wrong, why it matters, and how to stay safe and protect your work in the forge.

item.title: Dressing the Edge of a New Anvil
item.description: Learn how to properly dress the edge of a new anvil. See the tools, techniques, and tips to create clean edges while protecting your hammer and workpieces.

media:content.media:title: Dressing the Edge of a New Anvil
media:content.media:description: Learn how to properly dress the edge of a new anvil. See the tools, techniques, and tips to create clean edges while protecting your hammer and workpieces.

item.title: Reload: Back Plate for Forged Quilt Square
item.description: A fresh look at making the back plate for a forged quilt square. Follow the fabrication steps, fit-up process, and finishing details in the forge.

media:content.media:title: Reload: Back Plate for Forged Quilt Square
media:content.media:description: A fresh look at making the back plate for a forged quilt square. Follow the fabrication steps, fit-up process, and finishing details in the forge.

item.title: The Versatile Fly Press and Its Uses
item.description: Discover the versatility of the fly press in metalworking. See its practical uses, precision control, and how it improves efficiency in the shop.

media:content.media:title: The Versatile Fly Press and Its Uses
media:content.media:description: Discover the versatility of the fly press in metalworking. See its practical uses, precision control, and how it improves efficiency in the shop.

item.title: Fly Press: Making Butterfly Hinges
item.description: Using a fly press to craft precise butterfly hinges. Watch the forging process, shaping, and finishing techniques for durable, decorative hardware.

media:content.media:title: Fly Press: Making Butterfly Hinges
media:content.media:description: Using a fly press to craft precise butterfly hinges. Watch the forging process, shaping, and finishing techniques for durable, decorative hardware.

item.title: Mastering the Forge: Spike Tomahawk
item.description: Forging a spike tomahawk from raw steel. Follow the shaping, heat treatment, and finishing steps to create a functional and striking blade.

media:content.media:title: Mastering the Forge: Spike Tomahawk
media:content.media:description: Forging a spike tomahawk from raw steel. Follow the shaping, heat treatment, and finishing steps to create a functional and striking blade.

item.title: Don’t Miss This Hook of the Week
item.description: This week’s featured forged hook stands out for its design and craftsmanship. See the build process, details, and why it’s worth a closer look.

media:content.media:title: Don’t Miss This Hook of the Week
media:content.media:description: This week’s featured forged hook stands out for its design and craftsmanship. See the build process, details, and why it’s worth a closer look.

item.title: Forging the Back Plate for Quilt Square
item.description: Step-by-step forging of a back plate for a quilt square. Learn shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques to create a precise and durable metal piece.

media:content.media:title: Forging the Back Plate for Quilt Square
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step forging of a back plate for a quilt square. Learn shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques to create a precise and durable metal piece.
